items.title: Johnson And Johnson Balances Nipocalimab Progress With Bayer Legal Challenge
items.description: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) received FDA Fast Track designation for nipocalimab as a potential treatment for systemic lupus erythematosus, supported by positive Phase 2 data and the start of a Phase 3 trial. The company is advancing several other drug candidates across its pharmaceutical portfolio, underscoring an active research and development agenda. Bayer initiated legal action against Johnson & Johnson over product claims related to the prostate cancer market, raising questions around...

items.title: Retire Comfortably With These Dividend Growth Stocks
items.description: Of all the retirement activities you can engage in, worrying about your financial security shouldn’t be one of them. Owning dividend-paying stocks can help you relax and enjoy a more comfortable life — but only if you pick the right stocks and avoid the riskiest ones.
